content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Thorough review of the success reconciliation handler implementation. The code is well-structured with clear separation of concerns (success_reconciliation.rs handles the core logic, daemon_loop.rs integrates it into both multi-repo and single-repo paths). All 601 tests pass. Key design decisions are sound: idempotent bead close with post-failure status check, unconditional sync after close (correctly treats sync failure as fatal even on replay), crash-safe ordering (reconcile before mark_completed), and RunStatus::Completed returning Ok(()) to enable reconciliation-only retries. The task_id linkage flows through outcome_detail format and is extracted into a structured field. One asymmetry was investigated (single-repo path lacks label sync after reconciliation failure) but is expected since that path is test-only with no GitHub client. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
